title: Professional Experience
desc: My career path and the impactful roles I've held in the industry.

careers.description: Developed and maintained multiple client e-commerce platforms. Implemented secure payment gateways, Shipping System, and Real-time Inventory System. Also Assisted in migrating legacy PHP codebases to modern Laravel frameworks.

Developed a desktop-based Emotion Classification System using Python and Keras (Deep Learning), with a Tkinter GUI to facilitate real-time inference for laboratory practicums. Managed laboratory IT infrastructure and provided technical support for practicum sessions, ensuring high availability of hardware and software resources.

Performed calibration/troubleshooting for Electronic Volume Converters (EVC) and assembled Automatic Meter Reading (AMR) devices, consistently meeting accuracy targets. Managed inventory audits, facilitated component repairs, and generated technical reports to ensure operational compliance.
